offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent maintenance scheduling causes tenant complaints. We provide a subscription-based equipment maintenance tracking system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inconsistent maintenance scheduling leads to tenant complaints.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try usage monitoring and service scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
